name: from a ctp.config.yaml repo, a k8s source rule (no privileged container) is enforced natively at write-time and flagged at audit-time
command:
mkdir -p repo && printf 'apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
spec:
  containers:
  - securityContext:
      privileged: true
' > repo/pod.yaml && printf 'name: c
extends: [standard]
' > repo/ctp.config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file repo/pod.yaml 2>w.txt; wc=$?; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-audit.sh" --root repo 2>a.txt; ac=$?; [ "$wc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'g-k8s-no-privileged-container' w.txt && [ "$ac" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'status=red' a.txt && echo cloud-rule-both-phases 1>&2
